subcodes.first_line: O Nabil, son of Nabil! Sorrows from every direction have encompassed the Wronged One, and this grief is not on account of imprisonment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل بن نبیل مظلوم را احزان از هر شطری احاطه نموده و این حزن نه از جهت سجن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
